note: Every file in data/ is registered here with an accountable owner. A dataset is either awaiting independent review, in which case reviewPending is true and reviewedContentSha256 is null because there is no review to pin bytes to; or it has been reviewed, in which case it names its reviewer and carries a sha256 fingerprint of the exact bytes that were reviewed, and any later edit fails validation even if reviewedAt is untouched. Recording a review is a deliberate act: `npm run seal -- --reviewer=<id> [files...]`. A generated dataset carries its generator and generator version instead and may never claim a human reviewer.

fingerprint.pendingMeaning: reviewPending: true means no independent party has read these bytes yet. It is an honest gap, not a passing grade.

owners.ferroscope-maintainer: FerroScope maintainer (KKAIlab), accountable for what this dataset publishes
owners.independent-review-codex: Independent reviewer (Codex). The 2026-07-23 review covered behaviour, primary metadata, correction notices and link health, recorded in HANDOFF.md. It was not a byte-level review of any dataset, so no file names it as reviewer yet.

evidence-bundles.json.purpose: Question-to-minimum-evidence-bundle decision paths, and the assays that may never stand alone as a ferroptosis diagnosis. Created in the round-2 pass and not yet independently reviewed.

glossary.json.purpose: Trilingual terminology corpus; the only published location for Chinese and Japanese narrative.

intelligence-curated.json.purpose: Hand-selected research signals; legacy Chinese fields are overridden by signal-briefs-en.json.

knowledge-network.json.purpose: Typed mechanism nodes, directional mechanism edges and method-to-mechanism links.

lab-paper-links.json.purpose: Laboratory-to-paper contribution records; kept separate from canonical paper data.

lab-research-audits.json.purpose: Legacy audit sample records retained as provenance.

lab-research.json.purpose: Legacy Chinese evidence archive, including figure-level audits; not published as interpretation.

labs-en.json.purpose: Public English overlay for every tracked laboratory.

labs.json.purpose: Canonical laboratory records: id, website, category, tags and relevance. The Nankai entry now points at the official institutional page https://sklmcb-en.nankai.edu.cn/About/Administration.htm, which names Quan Chen as director; the strict link monitor resolved it with HTTP 200. That is reachability, not a content review, and these bytes still have no independent reviewer.

live.json.purpose: Automated signals. Each record states its source, its document class and that its evidence grade is unassessed.

meta.json.purpose: Aggregation timestamp, counts and per-source freshness state including retained-stale records.

methods.json.purpose: Method modules with evidence roles, cannot-prove boundaries and the decision fields that build a minimum evidence bundle. The decision layer was added in the round-2 pass and has not been independently reviewed.

monitoring-coverage.json.purpose: Per-laboratory monitoring coverage: author-watch tier, watch state, site-monitor state, review dates. Created in the round-2 pass and not yet independently reviewed.

paper-claims.json.purpose: Typed claims read out of the audited figure chain, used as the seed for the provenance graph. Created in the round-2 pass and not yet independently reviewed.

papers-en.json.purpose: Canonical English paper layer with separated article stage, post-publication status, reading depth, verification depth and structured verification sources. Restructured in the round-2 pass and not yet independently reviewed.

record-overlays.json.purpose: Curated document-class and evidence-grade decisions for automated records. Created in the round-2 pass and not yet independently reviewed.

historical-link-overlays.json.purpose: Round-4 non-destructive corrections for archival links whose stored reachability is no longer true. Each overlay is bound by validate-data.mjs to the exact unchanged archive assertion it supersedes; the archive itself is never edited. Not yet independently reviewed.

resources.json.purpose: External research routes with authority, language and use boundary.

schema-versions.json.purpose: This manifest. It is excluded from its own fingerprint check.

watch-queries.json.purpose: PubMed author queries for tracked laboratories; labels are internal, never published. Eight watches were added in the round-2 pass and have not been executed or reviewed.
